ns0:entry.ns0:title: Automattic/wordpress-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Automattic/wordpress-mcp
Language: php
WordPress MCP — This repository will be deprecated as stable releases of mcp-adapter become available. Please use https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter for ongoing development and support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BookStackApp/BookStack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BookStackApp/BookStack
Language: php
A platform to create documentation/wiki content built with PHP & Laravel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dolibarr/dolibarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dolibarr/dolibarr
Language: php
Dolibarr ERP CRM is a modern software package to manage your company or foundation's activity (contacts, suppliers, invoices, orders, stocks, agenda, accounting, ...). it's an open source Web application (written in PHP) designed for businesses of any sizes, foundations and freelancers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/mcp-adapter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter
Language: php
An MCP adapter that bridges the Abilities API to the Model Context Protocol, enabling MCP clients to discover and invoke WordPress plugin, theme, and core abilities programmatically.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: assimon/dujiaoka
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/assimon/dujiaoka
Language: php
🦄独角数卡(自动售货系统)-开源站长自动化售货解决方案、高效、稳定、快速！🚀🚀🎉🎉

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aureuserp/aureuserp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aureuserp/aureuserp
Language: php
Free and Open Source ERP platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: filamentphp/filament
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/filamentphp/filament
Language: php
A powerful open-source UI framework for Laravel • Build and ship apps & admin panels fast with Livewire

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glpi-project/glpi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi
Language: php
GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.
